title: Crafting an Interactive Data Visualization
scenario: Create a prompt that generates an interactive data visualization for a business intelligence dashboard. The visualization should be a combination of text, images, and interactive elements. The output should be an HTML file representing the visualization.
constraints: Must include at least 3 interactive elements
Must use 'D3.js' library for data visualization
Must include a 'legend' for data interpretation

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated visualization accurately represent the data and provide clear insights?
Are the interactive elements properly implemented, with clear and concise labels?
Is the generated HTML code readable, with clear and concise HTML tags?
